text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet inspects her signature racewear
carefully...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmm, hmm, hmm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But of course! My big day is coming up, so I need
to check for myself that everything's up to snuff!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: This is my outfit, after all. I can't let a single stray thread go unplucked!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Still... Sigh... No matter how many times I look at it, it's still as beautiful as ever.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I suppose I have to, don't I? How can I
know for sure how it feels unless I actually put it
on?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I-I know what you're thinking! But it's not like I want to wear it or anything! I'm just checking, is all!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Clear out! I can't change while you're still here!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh! Just like I thought, it looks magnificent!
Perfect for a G1 racer like myself!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I wish I could wear this all day, every day! ♪
choice_data_list: So you really did just want to wear it...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
O-o-o-of course not! That's not what I meant at
all!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Besides, look who's talking! I bet you only asked
because you wanted to see me wear it, didn't
you?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wait, that came out super weird—
choice_data_list: I thought you wanted to show off.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wha—?! Are you being serious right now?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You... You are, aren't you? Wow...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...So? What do you think now that you see it close
up?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hnnnnnhhh! Wh-why are you so... Argh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She unleashes a tirade in her signature racewear,
but I can tell that, deep down, she's quite
pleased.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What?! O-obviously not! You've totally got the
wrong idea!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Who asked you?! Of course it does! That's not
going to work on me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. If you ever want me to wear this in front of you again, you'd best be prepared to ask really nicely!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So... does that mean she'll do it if I want? I sense
it's better not to ask for clarification.
